summary: Iteration 9 - Bug Fix Testing Complete. All 4 bug fixes verified working. Market status badge shows 'LIVE MARKET' during market hours. Active Trades shows 'Upstox not connected' message. Signals tab shows LIVE mode banner. News feed has NO HTML tags.
test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
seed_data_creation: Using existing news and signals data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: (1) Market status badge shows LIVE MARKET during market hours 9:15 AM - 3:30 PM IST Mon-Fri, (2) Active Trades tab shows 'Upstox not connected' message when in LIVE mode with Upstox disconnected, (3) Signals tab shows LIVE mode banner, (4) News feed articles have clean text without HTML tags. App is in LIVE TRADING mode with Upstox disconnected.

bug_fix_1_market_status.description: Market status badge shows 'LIVE MARKET' during market hours (9:15 AM - 3:30 PM IST Mon-Fri)
bug_fix_1_market_status.verification: Playwright test verified badge shows 'LIVE MARKET' at ~12:51 IST which is within market hours

bug_fix_2_active_trades.description: Active Trades tab shows correct message for LIVE mode + Upstox disconnected
bug_fix_2_active_trades.verification: Playwright test verified message: 'Upstox not connected. Go to Settings > Broker to connect.'

bug_fix_3_signals_banner.description: Signals tab shows LIVE mode banner with appropriate message
bug_fix_3_signals_banner.verification: Playwright test verified banner: 'LIVE MODE: Connect Upstox in Settings to execute trades'

bug_fix_4_news_html_tags.description: News feed articles have no raw HTML tags in titles or descriptions
bug_fix_4_news_html_tags.verification: Both backend API test and Playwright UI test verified - no HTML tags found in 10 articles

api_verification.GET /api/news/latest: 200 OK - returns news without HTML tags
api_verification.GET /api/signals/latest: 200 OK - returns signals with valid structure

ui_verification.market_ticker: Shows 'LIVE MARKET' badge (green) during market hours
ui_verification.live_warning_banner: Shows 'LIVE MODE - NOT CONNECTED' with link to Settings
ui_verification.active_trades_tab: Shows empty state with 'Upstox not connected' message
ui_verification.signals_tab: Shows LIVE mode banner with connection instructions
ui_verification.news_feed_tab: All articles display clean text without HTML tags
